name: warp-codex
description: Warp terminal integration for Codex CLI with native Warp notifications on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Native Warp notifications for Codex CLI sessions
interface.longDescription: Adds Warp-native session notifications for Codex CLI via official Codex hooks and Warp OSC 777 notifications.
defaultPrompt: Install Warp notifications for my local Codex CLI
Show Codex task completion in Warp
Enable Warp session status for Codex
